bead.title: doctor + specs: report both install layers and document skill install topology
bead.description:
PROBLEM
`ddx doctor` does not surface the new two-layer install topology, and the install-location design is undocumented across the governing artifacts. Operators cannot tell whether a project resolves its plugin locally or falls back to the global layer, and there is no ADR/skill-topology record or CLAUDE.md guidance for the precedence rules introduced by the sibling beads.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/cmd/doctor.go:35 `runDoctor` reports only the single project install; it has no awareness of `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/ddx` nor of lazy-resolution.
- No ADR documents skill install topology; library/skills/ddx/SKILL.md, library/skills/ddx/reference/agents.md, and CLAUDE.md "Persona System" do not describe install precedence (project → global → baked-in) or agent-tier paths.

PROPOSED FIX
1. In cli/cmd/doctor.go add two report lines using `registry.ResolvePlugin` (sibling resolver bead) and `ddxroot.GlobalDir()`:
   - "Global Install (${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/ddx) — ok | missing".
   - "Project Install (<ddxroot>/plugins/ddx) — ok | missing | lazy-resolves-to-global" (the third state when the project copy is absent but resolution succeeds at the global layer).
2. File or update an ADR (docs/helix/02-design/adr/, skill install topology) describing the project → global → baked-in precedence and agent-tier paths (~/.claude/skills, ~/.agents/skills).
3. Document install precedence and locations in library/skills/ddx/SKILL.md ("How this skill works"), library/skills/ddx/reference/agents.md, and the CLAUDE.md "Persona System" section.

NON-SCOPE
- The resolver, install/update --global, and init topology (sibling beads). This bead consumes their behavior and reports/documents it.
- Agent-harness path discovery beyond Claude Code and Codex.

DEPS
Sibling registry-resolver bead (provides `ResolvePlugin` + layer strings and `ddxroot.GlobalDir()`); sibling install/update and init beads (must land so doctor's three states are reachable).
bead.acceptance:
1. `ddx doctor` renders a "Global Install" line reflecting presence/absence of `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/ddx` and a "Project Install" line with ok | missing | lazy-resolves-to-global — TestDoctor_ReportsBothInstallLayers asserts all three project-line states render correctly.
2. Spec updates landed in this bead's commit: an ADR (or equivalent) for skill install topology, plus updated library/skills/ddx/SKILL.md, library/skills/ddx/reference/agents.md, and CLAUDE.md "Persona System" documenting project → global → baked-in precedence and agent-tier paths.
3. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... green.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
